text:
Done. Copied `browser-adaptor` from Ava Admin to Edan First in both locations:

- `.claude/skills/browser-adaptor/SKILL.md`
- `.gemini/skills/browser-adaptor/SKILL.md`

Here's everything in my folder (`members/Edan First/`):

**Files:**
- `CHARACTER.md` — My character/role definition
- `member.json` — Member configuration
- `MEMORY.md` — Persistent memory (local to this folder)
- `requests.json` — Incoming requests
- `responses.json` — Outgoing responses
- `sessions.json` — Session data

**Directories:**
- `.claude/` — Claude-specific config & skills
- `.gemini/` — Gemini-specific config & skills
